items.title: Spatiotemporal Associations Between Cortical Microinfarcts and Cortical Superficial Siderosis in Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy.
items.abstract: Cerebral amyloid angiopathy (CAA) is a small vessel disease characterized by hemorrhagic and nonhemorrhagic brain injuries. While cortical cerebral microinfarcts (CMI) have been associated with cortical superficial siderosis (cSS), the mechanisms linking these lesions remain unknown. This study aims to determine the spatiotemporal relationship between cortical CMI and cSS in CAA, with the hypothesis that cSS can promote local ischemic injury. Patients with probable CAA (Boston Criteria v2.0) without previous symptomatic intracerebral hemorrhage or CAA-related inflammation were recruited from a prospective memory clinic-based cohort at Massachusetts General Hospital. CAA-related radiologic manifestations-including cortical CMI and cSS-were quantified at baseline and at the 24-month follow-up on 3-Tesla MRI. Multivariable logistic regression and generalized linear models were applied to assess associations between baseline radiologic features and radiologic progression. We also compared the local density of cortical CMIs in regions with and without overlaid cSS. Among 74 patients with probable CAA (age: 73.0 [67.9-78.2] years; 38% female), 26 (35%) had cortical CMIs (n = 135, 39% underlying cSS). Compared with CMI-negative CAA, those with CMI had a higher cSS prevalence (73% vs 40%;  Our findings demonstrate a close interplay between cortical CMI and cSS, with the spatiotemporal relationship supporting the hypothesis that convexity subarachnoid hemorrhage, and potentially resultant cSS, may trigger local ischemic injury. Given the sample size of the longitudinal cohort, we consider these data hypothesis-generating. Further studies should confirm this association and identify the driving pathophysiology, which may represent a new therapeutic target for preventing cSS-associated cortical injury.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）は小血管病変で、出血性・非出血性の脳損傷を特徴とする。皮質微小梗塞（CMI）と皮質表層鉄沈着（cSS）は関連が示唆されるが、その機序は不明である。  
方法：症候性脳内出血やCAA関連炎症のない推定CAA患者74名（平均年齢73歳）を対象に、3テスラMRIでベースラインと24か月後の皮質CMIおよびcSSを評価。多変量ロジスティック回帰や一般化線形モデルで両者の時空間的関連を解析し、cSSの有無によるCMI局所密度も比較した。  
結果：CMI陽性群はcSSの有病率が73％とCMI陰性群の40％より有意に高かった。CMIの39％はcSSの存在する部位に認められ、cSSが局所的な虚血性損傷を促進する可能性が示唆された。  
結論：皮質CMIとcSSは密接に関連し、くも膜下出血に伴うcSSが局所虚血を誘発するメカニズムの存在を支持する。サンプル数の制約から仮説生成的知見であり、さらなる検証と病態解明が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）患者74名を対象に、皮質微小梗塞（CMI）と皮質表層鉄沈着（cSS）の時空間的関連を3T-MRIで24か月追跡調査した。CMI陽性群はcSSの有病率が高く、cSSが局所的な虚血性損傷を促進する可能性が示唆された。これらの結果は、cSSが皮質虚血の誘因となり得ることを支持し、新たな治療標的の可能性を示すが、さらなる検証が必要である。

items.title: Blood-Brain Barrier Disruption Before Interhospital Transfer for Thrombectomy and Clinical Outcome.
items.abstract: In acute ischemic stroke with large vessel occlusion (AIS-LVO), interhospital transfer for endovascular therapy (EVT) provides an ideal therapeutic window during which neuroprotective strategies could be evaluated, allowing sufficient exposure before reperfusion. We aimed to determine whether blood-brain barrier (BBB) disruption assessed before interhospital transfer for EVT is associated with 24-hour hemorrhagic transformation (HT) and 3-month functional outcome. In this multicenter retrospective study, we included patients with anterior circulation AIS-LVO transferred from 4 French primary stroke centers (PSCs) to comprehensive stroke centers for EVT assessment, with baseline MR perfusion imaging performed at the PSC before transfer. BBB disruption was quantified as the percentage signal change due to gadolinium leakage on perfusion source images. Mean permeability derangement (MPD) was defined as the average of all voxels within the ischemic core exhibiting permeability values greater than a prespecified threshold. The primary outcome was any intraparenchymal HT on 24-hour follow-up imaging. The association between MPD and HT was studied in multivariable mixed binary logistic regression analyses. A total of 289 patients were included: the median age was 74 years (interquartile range 63-81), 49% were female, the median NIHSS score was 13 (7-19), the median last-seen-well-to-PSC imaging time was 2.5 hours (1.7-4.7), and the median core volume was 17 mL (0-40). Intravenous thrombolysis was administered before transfer in 71% of patients, and EVT was eventually performed in 71%. The median time from PSC imaging to comprehensive stroke center arrival was 3.3 hours (2.6-3.8). Any HT at 24 hours occurred in 129 patients (45%). In multivariable analysis, MPD ≥3% was independently associated with any HT (OR 6.58; 95% CI 2.84-15.22;  BBB disruption on pretransfer perfusion MRI is associated with 24-hour HT and poor 3-month functional outcome in patients with AIS-LVO. These findings highlight its potential value for early risk stratification and justify prospective evaluation of BBB-targeted strategies during interhospital transfer for EVT.
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性虚血性脳卒中（AIS）における大血管閉塞（LVO）患者の血液脳関門（BBB）破綻が、血栓回収療法（EVT）前の病院間搬送時に予後に与える影響は不明であった。  
方法：フランスの4つの一次脳卒中センターから包括的脳卒中センターへEVT評価のため搬送された前方循環AIS-LVO患者289例を対象に、搬送前に一次センターで実施したMRパーフュージョン画像でBBB破綻を評価。BBB破綻はガドリニウム漏出による信号変化率（MPD）で定量化し、24時間後の出血性変化（HT）との関連を多変量ロジスティック回帰で解析した。  
結果：患者の中央値年齢74歳、71%が搬送前に静注血栓溶解療法を受け、71%が最終的にEVT施行。24時間後のHTは45%に認められた。MPDが3%以上の群はHT発生リスクが有意に高く（オッズ比6.58）、3か月後の機能的予後も悪かった。  
結論：搬送前のBBB破綻は24時間以内の出血性変化および3か月の機能予後不良と関連し、早期リスク層別化や搬送中のBBB標的治療の検討に有用である。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性虚血性脳卒中（AIS-LVO）患者において、血液脳関門（BBB）破綻を転院前のMR灌流画像で評価した結果、BBB破綻の程度（MPD≥3%）は24時間以内の出血性変化（HT）発生と3か月後の機能予後不良と有意に関連した。これにより、転院中の早期リスク評価やBBBを標的とした治療戦略の検討が重要であることが示唆された。

items.title: Cerebral Artery Pulsatility, Premorbid Blood Pressure, and Small Vessel Disease on Brain Imaging: A Population-Based Study.
items.abstract: Increased pulsatility of cerebral blood flow is proposed as a potential cause of cerebral small vessel disease (SVD), but the apparent association could be confounded by shared vascular risk factors, especially current and past blood pressure (BP). Most previous studies were small, usually in selected populations, and most did not adjust fully for confounders, particularly heart rate, pulse pressure, and premorbid BP. Therefore, we aimed to determine if cerebral pulsatility is independently associated with SVD on brain imaging. Patients with TIA or minor ischemic stroke (NIH Stroke Scale ≤3) ascertained from 2011 to 2018 in a prospective population-based cohort study in Oxfordshire, the United Kingdom, were included. Cerebral pulsatility was measured with pulsatility index at the middle cerebral artery (MCA-PI) by transcranial Doppler ultrasound, and the burden of SVD was assessed using standard rating scales on MRI. We determined the associations of MCA-PI and SVD (total SVD score) adjusting for age, sex, vascular risk factors, heart rate, baseline BP (systolic, diastolic, and pulse pressure), and multiple premorbid BP readings up to 20 years before the event. We also performed mediation analysis to assess the contribution of MCA-PI on the causal pathway between BP and SVD. Among 1,035 consecutive patients with measurements of both MCA-PI and SVD burden on MRI (mean age 66 years; 52.1% men), higher MCA-PI was associated with the total SVD score on MRI (top vs bottom quartile odds ratio [OR] 9.00, 95% CI 6.32-12.84). The association was attenuated after adjustment, but it remained significant (fully adjusted for systolic and diastolic BP OR 2.67, 1.55-4.60; for PP OR 1.88, 1.12-3.14). The results were consistent for individual markers of SVD ( In this cross-sectional analysis, cerebral pulsatility was positively associated with the increasing burden of cerebral SVD on brain MRI independent of age, sex, vascular risk factors, heart rate, baseline and premorbid BP in patients with TIA or minor ischemic stroke, and also explained a significant proportion of the association between BP and cerebral SVD on brain MRI. Prospective cohort studies and clinical trials targeting cerebral pulsatility are underway, which will help to further establish the role of cerebral pulsatility in SVD.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳の小血管病変（SVD）は脳血流の拍動性増加が原因とされるが、血圧などの共通リスク因子の影響が混在している可能性がある。従来の研究は小規模で選択的集団が多く、心拍数や脈圧、過去の血圧を十分に調整していなかった。  
方法：イギリス・オックスフォードシャーのTIAまたは軽度虚血性脳卒中患者1,035名（平均66歳）を対象に、経頭蓋ドップラーで中大脳動脈の拍動指数（MCA-PI）を測定し、MRIでSVDの重症度を評価。年齢、性別、血管リスク因子、心拍数、基準時および過去20年分の血圧を調整し、MCA-PIとSVDの関連を解析。  
結果：MCA-PIが高い群はSVDスコアが有意に高く（四分位比較OR 9.00）、調整後も関連は維持（収縮期・拡張期血圧調整後OR 2.67）。血圧とSVDの関連においてもMCA-PIが媒介的役割を果たすことが示された。  
結論：脳の拍動性は血圧や他のリスク因子に独立してSVDの増加と関連し、血圧とSVDの関係の一部を説明する。今後、拍動性を標的とした前向き研究や臨床試験が進められている。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、一過性脳虚血発作や軽度脳梗塞患者1,035名を対象に、脳動脈の拍動性（MCA-PI）と脳小血管病変（SVD）の関連を調査した。年齢や性別、血圧などのリスク因子を調整しても、拍動性の上昇はMRIで評価したSVDの負荷増加と独立して関連し、血圧とSVDの関係の一部を説明した。脳拍動性がSVD発症に重要な役割を果たす可能性が示され、今後の前向き研究や介入試験が期待される。

items.title: Genetic Risk for Alzheimer Disease, Midlife Hypertension, and Dementia: The ARIC Neurocognitive Study.
items.abstract: Genetics represent a nonmodifiable risk factor for Alzheimer disease (AD), with 60%-80% heritability. Midlife hypertension is a modifiable risk factor for both dementia and death. Our primary objective was to determine how genetic risk for AD modifies the association between hypertension and dementia. The Atherosclerosis Risk in Communities Study is an ongoing community-based prospective cohort study of 4 US centers. We analyzed White and Black participants free of dementia at age 55 years with genotypes and blood pressure measured at visit 1 (1987-1989). Three genetic risk groups (low, medium, high) were defined based on tertiles of a race-specific AD polygenic risk score. Dementia was ascertained through cognitive testing, informant interviews, hospitalization, codes and death records. Death was ascertained through the National Death Index. We examined the association of midlife hypertension with incident dementia within 3 genetic risk groups using Cox proportional-hazards and cumulative incidence function estimations. We used age 55 years as the time origin, with left truncation to allow entry at ages older than 55 years; age on December 31, 2022, was the administrative censoring date. Among 8,931 White and 2,666 Black participants, the median follow up time was 26.6 and 23.8 years, the mean age was 54.0/53.5 years, and 53.0%/62.5% were female, respectively. After adjusting for demographics, midlife hypertension was significantly associated with dementia incidence across all genetic risk groups among White participants (low risk hazard ratio [HR] 1.29; 95% CI 1.07-1.55, medium risk HR 1.34; 95% CI 1.13-1.58, high risk HR 1.19; 95% CI 1.03-1.38) and among Black participants at high genetic risk (HR 1.31; 95% CI 1.04-1.66). Associations for low and medium genetic risk Black participants were consistent but not statistically significant. There were no significant differences in association of hypertension with dementia by AD genetic risk group. Individuals with hypertension had a 0%-2% higher probability of developing dementia by age 80 and a 6%-13% lower probability of dementia-free survival to age 80 years vs those without hypertension, across race and genetic risk groups. Genetic risk for AD does not modify the association between hypertension and dementia. These data support the fact that all individuals with hypertension are likely to benefit from antihypertensive treatment.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）の遺伝的リスクは60～80％の遺伝率を持ち非可変である一方、中年期の高血圧は認知症および死亡の修正可能なリスク因子である。  
方法：米国4地域のコミュニティを対象とした前向きコホート研究（ARIC研究）で、55歳時点で認知症のない白人8,931名と黒人2,666名を対象に、ADの多遺伝子リスクスコアに基づく3群（低・中・高リスク）に分け、中年期高血圧と認知症発症の関連をCox比例ハザードモデルで解析した。追跡期間中央値は白人26.6年、黒人23.8年。  
結果：白人全リスク群で中年期高血圧は認知症発症リスクを有意に増加させ（HR約1.2～1.3）、黒人では高リスク群で有意、低・中リスク群では傾向はあるが有意でなかった。遺伝的リスクによる高血圧と認知症の関連の差異は認められなかった。高血圧者は80歳までの認知症発症確率が0～2％上昇し、認知症発症なし生存率は6～13％低下した。  
結論：ADの遺伝的リスクは高血圧と認知症の関連を修飾しない。高血圧のある全ての個人は降圧治療の利益を享受できることを支持する結果である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アルツハイマー病（AD）の遺伝的リスクが中年期の高血圧と認知症発症の関連に与える影響を検討した。米国の大規模コホートで白人と黒人を対象に約24～27年追跡し、遺伝リスク別に解析。結果、高血圧は全遺伝リスク群で認知症リスクを有意に増加させたが、遺伝リスクによる影響修飾は認められなかった。高血圧患者は認知症発症確率がやや高く、抗高血圧治療の重要性が示された。

items.title: Putamen Dopamine Synthesis, Vesicular Storage, and Metabolism in Patients With Parkinson Disease.
items.abstract: Putamen dopamine depletion characterizes Parkinson disease (PD). Intraneuronal processes determining dopamine stores have not been systematically examined. This study explored relative contributions of dopamine synthesis, storage, and metabolism to control-PD differences. We updated an intramural tabulation from 2002 to 2024 of postmortem putamen tissue contents of reactants, including the autotoxic dopamine metabolite 3,4-dihydroxyphenylacetaldehyde (DOPAL), from patients with PD and controls. Based on computational models applying first-order kinetics and equilibrium equations, we then compared estimated rates of dopamine synthesis through tyrosine hydroxylase (TH), L-aromatic-amino-acid decarboxylase, vesicular active uptake and passive leakage, exocytotic release and reuptake, and other intraneuronal processes. Results from the modeling were compared with those from in vivo  Postmortem data were analyzed from 13 patients with PD (median age 77 years, range 73-85 years) and 20 controls (median age 77 years, range 35-91 years). There was approximately a 98% decrease in putamen tissue dopamine in PD, and the concentration ratio of DOPAL/dopamine (DA) was approximately 9 times that of control. Applying the simplest kinetic model, vesicular sequestration was estimated to be decreased by 98.5% (0.073 vs 4.91 nmol/minute). Approximately 3-fold greater in vivo "washout" of putamen  Convergent quantitative evidence points to a substantial vesicular storage defect in residual dopaminergic terminals in PD. This finding challenges the sufficiency of nigrostriatal dopaminergic denervation alone to account for the biochemical phenotype of PD and highlights vesicular dopamine handling as a critical determinant of putamen dopamine deficiency. The reaction rate estimates were drawn from published point values rather than fitted to an experimental data set, and so conventional goodness-of-fit regression statistics were not conducted. Because of the assumption of steady-state conditions for calculating reaction rates based on equilibrium equations, the model does not address the dynamics of disease pathogenesis over years but does provide a platform for further extension to disease progression. We estimated rates of reactions involved with the synthesis, storage, release, reuptake, and metabolism of dopamine in the putamen in PD and found that the main intraneuronal functional abnormality separating PD from controls was attenuated vesicular sequestration, implicating decreased vesicular uptake through the vesicular monoamine transporter and increased vesicular leakiness as key determinants of putamen dopamine deficiency in PD.
items.summary_ja:
背景：パーキンソン病（PD）は線条体の一部である被殻におけるドーパミン枯渇が特徴であるが、ドーパミンの細胞内合成、貯蔵、代謝過程の寄与は体系的に検討されていなかった。  
方法：2002年から2024年までの死後被殻組織のドーパミンおよび関連物質（特に自毒性代謝物DOPAL）の含有量をPD患者13例と対照20例で比較。さらに、酵素反応速度論と平衡方程式に基づく計算モデルを用いて、チロシン水酸化酵素やL-芳香族アミノ酸脱炭酸酵素による合成、細胞小胞への取り込み・漏出、放出・再取り込みなどの速度を推定した。  
結果：PD患者の被殻ドーパミンは約98％減少し、DOPAL/ドーパミン比は対照の約9倍に増加。計算モデルでは細胞小胞へのドーパミン隔離が98.5％減少し、細胞小胞モノアミントランスポーターを介した取り込み低下と漏出増加が示唆された。  
結論：PDの被殻ドーパミン欠乏は単なる神経脱落だけでなく、細胞小胞内ドーパミン貯蔵機能の著しい障害が主因である。細胞内ドーパミンの取り扱い異常がPDの生化学的特徴を決定づける重要な要素であり、今後の病態進行研究の基盤となる。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究はパーキンソン病（PD）患者の線条体ドパミン合成、貯蔵、代謝過程を解析し、PDでは線条体ドパミンが約98％減少し、毒性代謝物DOPALの比率が約9倍に増加することを示した。特に、ドパミンの小胞内貯蔵機能が約98.5％低下しており、小胞体モノアミントランスポーターの機能低下と小胞の漏出増加がドパミン欠乏の主要因であることを明らかにした。これにより、PDの病態には神経脱落だけでなく小胞内ドパミン処理異常が重要であることが示唆された。

items.title: Familial Aggregation of Parkinson Disease and Essential Tremor in Early and Late Onset Parkinson Disease Cohorts.
items.abstract: Early-onset Parkinson disease (EOPD) is associated with stronger genetic contributions than late-onset Parkinson disease (LOPD). However, the complex interplay between genetic susceptibility, family history, and environmental factors remains incompletely understood. This study assesses familial aggregation of PD and essential tremor (ET) among relatives of patients with EOPD and compares it with patients with LOPD. Patients with EOPD evaluated at the Mayo Clinic were identified, whereas patients with LOPD were identified through the Rochester Epidemiology Project record-linkage system. All cases with symptom onset between 1991 and 2020 were included. A total of 732 cases with EOPD and 469 with LOPD were included. EOPD patients were significantly more likely to have a positive family history of PD in parents (proportion ratio [PR] = 1.67,  The higher prevalence of PD and ET family history in the EOPD cohort supports a stronger genetic contribution and may reflect enrichment for high-penetrance monoallelic variants. Conversely, the higher frequency of affected siblings in the LOPD cohort suggests a polygenic inheritance pattern with greater environmental contribution.
items.summary_ja:
背景：早発型パーキンソン病（EOPD）は遅発型パーキンソン病（LOPD）よりも遺伝的要因の関与が強いとされるが、遺伝感受性、家族歴、環境要因の複雑な相互作用は未解明である。  
方法：メイヨークリニックで評価されたEOPD患者732例と、ロチェスター疫学プロジェクトで特定されたLOPD患者469例を対象に、1991年から2020年の発症症例を含め、家族内でのパーキンソン病（PD）および本態性振戦（ET）の集積を比較検討した。  
結果：EOPD患者は親族にPDの陽性家族歴を持つ割合が有意に高く（比率1.67）、PDおよびETの家族歴も多かった。一方、LOPD患者では兄弟姉妹に影響を受けた者の頻度が高かった。  
結論：EOPDにおけるPDおよびETの家族集積は、高浸透性の単一遺伝子変異の関与を示唆し、遺伝的寄与が強いことを支持する。LOPDでは多遺伝子性の遺伝パターンと環境要因の影響がより大きい可能性が示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、早発性パーキンソン病（EOPD）と遅発性パーキンソン病（LOPD）患者の家族におけるパーキンソン病（PD）および本態性振戦（ET）の集積を比較した。EOPD患者は親族にPDの家族歴が有意に多く、強い遺伝的要因が示唆された。一方、LOPD患者では兄弟姉妹の罹患率が高く、多遺伝子性遺伝と環境要因の関与が示された。

items.title: Neuropathologic Correlates of Seizures in Patients With Alzheimer Disease and Dementia With Lewy Bodies.
items.abstract: Seizures are a recognized comorbidity in dementia, with varying prevalence across Alzheimer disease (AD) and dementia with Lewy bodies (DLBs). Although previous studies have demonstrated an increased seizure risk in AD, the neuropathologic substrates underlying seizure susceptibility-particularly across dementia subtypes-remain incompletely understood. We aimed to identify distinct clinicopathologic correlates of clinically active seizures in AD and DLB using a large autopsy-confirmed cohort. We conducted a retrospective cohort study using data from the National Alzheimer's Coordinating Center (2005-December 2022). Autopsy-confirmed AD and DLB cases were included. Individuals with a history of stroke or traumatic brain injury were excluded. The primary outcome was clinically active seizures, defined as seizures occurring within 3 years before or after the diagnosis of dementia. Neuropathologic exposures included Braak stage, cerebral amyloid angiopathy (CAA), frontotemporal lobar degeneration, and vascular pathologies. Multivariable logistic regression models were used to examine associations between pathologic features and seizure occurrence, adjusting for relevant demographic covariates. A total of 3,498 participants were included, comprising 3,040 with AD (mean age, 73.4 years; 48.5% female) and 458 with DLB (mean age, 75.1 years; 31.4% female). Active seizures were identified in 174 participants with AD (5.7%) and 13 with DLB (2.8%). In AD, Braak stage VI (vs V) was associated with higher odds of active seizures (adjusted odds ratio [OR], 1.81; 95% CI 1.20-2.82;  In this autopsy-confirmed cohort, seizure susceptibility was associated with advanced tau pathology and CAA in AD. In DLB, exploratory analyses suggested a possible association between vascular pathology and seizures; however, these findings should be interpreted cautiously. Overall, the results support potentially distinct pathologic contributions to seizure susceptibility across dementia subtypes. Limitations include the use of advanced-stage pathologic samples, which may limit generalizability to earlier disease stages.
items.summary_ja:
背景：認知症患者におけるてんかん発作は合併症として知られ、アルツハイマー病（AD）とレビー小体型認知症（DLB）で発症率に差がある。これまでADでの発作リスク増加は示されているが、認知症亜型ごとの神経病理学的基盤は不明瞭であった。  
方法：国立アルツハイマー協調センターの自験例データ（2005～2022年）を用い、脳卒中や外傷歴を除外した自験例確定のADおよびDLB患者計3,498例（AD 3,040例、DLB 458例）を対象に、認知症診断前後3年以内の臨床的活動性てんかん発作の関連因子を後ろ向きに解析。Braakステージ、脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）、前頭側頭葉変性、血管病変を評価し、多変量ロジスティック回帰で調整解析を行った。  
結果：AD群の5.7％（174例）、DLB群の2.8％（13例）に活動性てんかん発作を認めた。ADではBraakステージVI（vs V）が発作リスク上昇と関連（調整オッズ比1.81、95％CI 1.20-2.82）し、CAAも関連が示唆された。DLBでは血管病変との関連が探索的に示されたが慎重な解釈が必要であった。  
結論：ADにおけるてんかん発作感受性は進行したタウ病理とCAAに関連し、DLBでは血管病変が関与する可能性が示唆された。認知症亜型ごとに異なる病理学的要因が発作感受性に寄与することを支持するが、進行期サンプルの使用による一般化の制限がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アルツハイマー病（AD）およびレビー小体型認知症（DLB）患者における発作の神経病理学的関連を検討した。3,498例の剖検確定例を解析し、ADでは高度なタウ病理（BraakステージVI）と脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）が発作リスクの増加と関連した。一方、DLBでは血管病変との関連が示唆されたが慎重な解釈が必要である。認知症亜型ごとに発作感受性の病理学的基盤が異なる可能性を示唆した。

items.title: Neuropsychological Profile and Cognitive Trajectories of Patients With Biomarker Evidence of Alzheimer Disease or Dementia With Lewy bodies.
items.abstract: Alzheimer disease (AD) and dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB) often coexist, yet the cognitive effect of mixed AD and α-synuclein pathology in vivo remains unclear. We aimed to (1) characterize baseline neuropsychological profiles, (2) assess plasma biomarker associations, and (3) examine longitudinal cognitive trajectories in patients with AD, DLB, and mixed pathology in a memory clinic cohort. This was a retrospective longitudinal study including participants from an academic memory clinic cohort with available CSF and blood samples at baseline who completed a comprehensive cognitive assessment. Baseline neuropsychological performance was compared between groups using analysis of covariance controlling for age, sex, and education. Associations between plasma biomarkers and cognition were examined using multiple linear regression models. Linear mixed-effects models examined longitudinal change across groups, with time from baseline, diagnosis, the diagnosis-by-time interaction, baseline age, sex, and years of education as fixed effects, and intercept as a random effect. A total of 350 participants (mean age 70.1 ± 6.6 years; 48.6% female) were included: AD alone (n = 249), AD with α-synuclein pathology (n = 31), DLB alone (n = 33), and DLB with AD pathology (n = 37). At baseline, patients with AD showed greater impairment than those with DLB in memory and language (all  Distinct neuropsychological profiles and trajectories emerge in AD and DLB depending on underlying pathology. Identifying mixed pathology in vivo is clinically relevant for accurate diagnosis and prognosis and has implications for outcome measures and patient stratification in clinical trials.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）とレビー小体型認知症（DLB）はしばしば併存するが、生体内でのADとα-シヌクレイン病理の混合が認知機能に与える影響は不明である。  
方法：学術メモリークリニックのコホート350名（平均年齢70.1歳、女性48.6％）を対象に、AD単独、AD＋α-シヌクレイン病理、DLB単独、DLB＋AD病理の4群に分類。ベースラインでの神経心理学的評価と血漿バイオマーカーの関連を多変量解析で検討し、線形混合効果モデルで認知機能の経時変化を比較した。  
結果：ベースラインではAD群がDLB群より記憶と言語機能で有意に低下。混合病理群はそれぞれの特徴を示し、認知機能の経時的変化にも群ごとの異なる軌跡が認められた。血漿バイオマーカーは認知機能と関連した。  
結論：ADとDLBは基礎となる病理により異なる神経心理学的特徴と認知経過を示す。生体内での混合病理の同定は診断・予後の精度向上に重要であり、臨床試験のアウトカム設定や患者層別化に有用である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アルツハイマー病（AD）とレビー小体型認知症（DLB）の単独および混合病理を持つ患者の神経心理学的特徴と認知経過を検討した。AD群は記憶と言語機能でDLB群より重度の障害を示し、混合病理の存在は認知機能の進行に影響を与えた。血漿バイオマーカーと認知機能の関連も示され、混合病理の生体内識別は診断・予後の精度向上や臨床試験の患者層別化に重要である。

items.title: Intensive Rehabilitation With Adjunctive Bilateral Anodal tDCS in Post-Stroke Dysphagia: A Multicenter Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.abstract: Oropharyngeal dysphagia is a common and disabling consequence of stroke. Transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) has shown potential in promoting swallowing recovery, although evidence remains limited. To determine whether bilateral anodal tDCS combined with intensive speech-language therapy (SLT) improves swallowing outcomes compared with sham stimulation in patients with post-stroke dysphagia. Exploratory analyses examined the influence of treatment phase, sex, lesion site, and baseline severity. This multicenter, randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial enrolled patients with supratentorial or infratentorial ischemic stroke and oropharyngeal dysphagia. Participants received either bilateral anodal tDCS or sham stimulation (1.5 mA, 20 min/day, 5 days/week for 2 weeks) combined with intensive SLT over 6 weeks. Swallowing outcomes were assessed at baseline, 2 weeks, and 6 weeks using the Dysphagia Outcome and Severity Scale (DOSS, primary outcome), Penetration-Aspiration Scale (PAS), Mann Assessment of Swallowing Ability (MASA), and Swallowing Quality of Life questionnaire (SWAL-QoL). Forty-six patients (24 active, 22 sham) completed the protocol. Both groups showed significant improvement across all outcomes (p < 0.001), with no significant difference between active and sham stimulation. The DOSS was the most sensitive measure, showing sustained improvement over time. Exploratory analyses indicated greater MASA gains with active tDCS in infratentorial strokes (p = 0.04). Correlation analyses showed that greater baseline dysphagia severity was associated with larger functional gains. Intensive SLT was associated with meaningful recovery in post-stroke dysphagia, regardless of stimulation condition. Exploratory findings suggest that bilateral tDCS may confer additional benefit in selected lesion subgroups.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳卒中後の嚥下障害は日常生活に大きな支障をきたす。経頭蓋直流刺激（tDCS）は嚥下機能回復に有望だが、エビデンスは限られている。  
方法：多施設共同の二重盲検ランダム化比較試験で、上・下小脳梗塞患者の嚥下障害に対し、両側陽極tDCS（1.5mA、20分/日、週5日×2週）と集中的言語療法（SLT、6週）を併用した群と偽刺激群を比較。嚥下機能はDOSSを主指標にPAS、MASA、SWAL-QoLで評価した。  
結果：46名（実群24、偽群22）が完遂。両群とも全指標で有意改善（p<0.001）を示したが、群間差はなかった。DOSSは最も感度が高く、改善が持続。探索的解析で下小脳梗塞群において実群のMASA改善が有意に大きかった（p=0.04）。重症例ほど機能改善が大きい傾向も認められた。  
結論：集中的SLTは刺激条件に関わらず有効であり、両側陽極tDCSは特定の病変部位で追加効果を示唆する。
items.summary_short_ja: 本多施設共同無作為二重盲検試験により、脳卒中後の嚥下障害患者に対し、集中的言語療法（SLT）と両側陽極tDCS併用群と偽刺激群を比較した。両群とも嚥下機能は有意に改善したが、群間差は認められなかった。探索的解析では、小脳梗塞患者においてtDCS併用群がより良好な嚥下能力向上を示し、重度患者ほど機能回復が大きかった。集中的SLTが主要な回復要因と考えられるが、tDCSは特定病変群で追加効果が期待される。
